document.title: Post-Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
standards: MDR Annex XIV, Part B – Post-market clinical follow-up
MDCG 2020-7 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Plan Template - A guide for manufacturers and notified bodies, April 2020
MDCG 2020-8 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Evaluation Report Template - A guide for manufacturers and notified bodies, April 2020

sourceSummary.oneLine: PMCF evaluation report for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW under EU MDR.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents PMCF activity findings as part of the clinical evaluation report and technical documentation.
keyPoints: The device is a wired or wireless digital flat panel detector for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy in adults and children, except infants.
The device is Class IIb in accordance with rule 10 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
PMCF activities included customer satisfaction survey, customer complaints, and screening scientific literature and other clinical data sources.
No additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified through PMCF activities.
No preventive or corrective measures were identified as needed.

concepts.name: Post-market clinical follow-up
concepts.evidence: The Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745 (MDR) considers the post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) as a continuous process that updates the clinical evaluation

concepts.name: Clinical evaluation report
concepts.evidence: The manufacturer shall analyse the findings coming from the activities foreseen in the PMCF plan and document the results in this PMCF evaluation report that shall be part of the clinical evaluation report and the technical documentation.

concepts.evidence: document the results in this PMCF evaluation report that shall be part of the clinical evaluation report and the technical documentation.

evidence.claim: The report is a PMCF evaluation report for a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Post-Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The covered models are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Model name: A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector A1717MCW A1417MCW F1417MCW

evidence.claim: Revision 1 is dated March 25, 2025 and was issued due to addition of survey details.
evidence.evidenceText: 1 March 25, 2025 Revision due to addition of survey details. (Customer satisfaction survey and customer complaints)

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. with SRN KR-MF-000020684.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer’s Name H&abyz Co., Ltd. SRN KR-MF-000020684

evidence.claim: JaviTech e.K. is identified as the authorised representative.
evidence.evidenceText: Authorised Representative name: JaviTech e.K.

evidence.claim: The device is indicated for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The device is not to be used for mammography, infants, pregnant women, fluoroscopy, or angiography.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography. Not to be used for infant and pregnant women. Not to be used for fluoroscopy and angiography.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector contraindications

evidence.claim: The device is classified as Class IIb under MDR Annex VIII rule 10.
evidence.evidenceText: Class IIb in accordance with rule 10 of Annex VIII Regulation (EU) 2017/745

evidence.claim: The expected lifetime is 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Expected lifetime 5 years
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector expected lifetime

evidence.claim: PMCF activities were conducted as planned with no deviations.
evidence.evidenceText: The activities were conducted as planned. There were no deviations from the PMCF plan.

evidence.claim: The PMCF found no new critical issues regarding device performance or safety.
evidence.evidenceText: There were no new critical issues regarding the performance or safety of the device at this PMCF.

evidence.claim: Customer satisfaction survey data covered 8 healthcare professionals or distributors.
evidence.evidenceText: A total of 8 healthcare professionals/distributors were surveyed on customer satisfaction

evidence.claim: No customer complaints were reported regarding the product during the survey period.
evidence.evidenceText: There were no customer complaints regarding the product during the survey period.

evidence.claim: No additional safety and performance matters were confirmed from survey and complaint activities.
evidence.evidenceText: There were no additional confirmed matters related to safety and performance.

evidence.claim: Scientific literature screening found no additional confirmed literature.
evidence.evidenceText: Literature search : There was no additional confirmed literature.

evidence.claim: FDA recall search returned zero results for product code MQB for May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: FDA Recall 0 Advance search: May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024 Keyword: MQB (Product Code)

evidence.claim: MFDS recall and suspension search returned zero results for the stated search period.
evidence.evidenceText: Korea - MFDS Recall and suspension of sale 0 Advance search: May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024 Keyword: 의료영상획득장치
evidence.pageTarget: MFDS recall and suspension of sale

evidence.claim: MHRA alerts and recalls search returned zero results for x-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: United Kingdom - MHRA Alerts and recalls for drugs and medical devices 0 Advance search: May 06, 2024 to December 31, 2024 Keyword: x-ray detector

evidence.claim: The report identifies DRX-1, CXDI-70C, and CXDI-31 as equivalent or similar devices.
evidence.evidenceText: Product name of equivalent / similar device DRX-1 Product name of equivalent / similar device CXDI-70C Product name of equivalent / similar device CXDI-31

evidence.claim: The applicable references include MDR Annex XIV Part B, MDCG 2020-7, and MDCG 2020-8.
evidence.evidenceText: MDR Annex XIV, Part B – Post-market clinical follow-up MDCG 2020-7 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Plan Template - A guide for manufacturers and notified bodies, April 2020 MDCG 2020-8 Post-market clinical follow-up (PMCF) Evaluation Report Template - A guide for manufacturers and notified bodies, April 2020

evidence.claim: The overall PMCF conclusion was that no additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified.
evidence.evidenceText: No additional impact on clinical safety and performance was identified through PMCF activities.

evidence.claim: No preventive or corrective measures were needed.
evidence.evidenceText: Need for preventive and/or corrective measures None

evidence.claim: The first PMCF report date was December 31, 2024, with a planned second report in December 2025 and annual timeline.
evidence.evidenceText: Reported date of the first report: December 31, 2024 Planned date of the second report: December 2025 Timeline: Once a year

reviewFlags.reason: The document text contains placeholder activity counts: 'X related Survey, X related Literature, X related FDA Recall, X related MFDS Product Recall and Suspension of Sale and X MHRA Alerts and Recalls.'
The source does not state a notified body name, CE certificate number, or regulatory approval status.
The report cites EU MDR and PMCF guidance, but the provided authoritySignal 'CE/MDR' is not independently stated as a CE marking status in the source text.
